storeDescription: A flexible storefront demo for mixed inventory businesses.

guidance.profileNote: Save your preferred delivery timing and payment method once for repeat checkout.
guidance.cartNote: Free delivery applies inside Dhaka on larger orders. Pick the right zone and delivery window before checkout.
guidance.checkoutHint: The store will confirm delivery availability and exact timing on WhatsApp after reviewing the order.

minimumOrderAmount.message: Minimum order is BDT 400 for this storefront.

Cash on Delivery.message: Cash on Delivery is available for Inside Dhaka or Store Pickup orders from BDT 600.
Cash on Delivery.zoneRequiredMessage: Choose a delivery zone to confirm Cash on Delivery availability.

Card on Delivery.message: Card on Delivery is only available inside Dhaka for orders from BDT 1,500.
Card on Delivery.zoneRequiredMessage: Choose an inside-Dhaka delivery zone before using Card on Delivery.

announcementBar.text: Free delivery over BDT 2,500 this week across selected categories.

homepageConfiguration.newsletterTitle: Get new arrivals and weekly offers from Daniel's Shop.
homepageConfiguration.newsletterDescription: Save your email for store updates, curated picks, and campaign launches.
